speaker: MATT
raw_text: There are a number of coins in there. There's probably a good, hefty pile of gold, slightly molded by the moisture that's been kept inside this chest until it was detonated. Gathering it up, you find approximately 420 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I have your thingy

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My thingy?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Your eraser thingy?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know where it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, thanks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You're welcome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The familiar whine of the trap catches your ear. You dodge out of the way instinctively. Your sister's not so lucky. You take the brunt of the damage, but not the full damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. Did I destroy the loot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to inspect what the chest once was. As you go back to where the chest was, most of the chest is destroyed. It's knocked off its hinge. What you do find inside, though, is what looks like a very, very... There we go. What looks like a slightly-charred two-handed blade: a giant sword that is currently laid inside. Looks like it's been there a while in storage. There was a set of natural armor that's been completely destroyed by the blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, come on!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'll give you a detailed description. Essentially, this pyramid comes to a top and then flattens up at the very top. Where you would expect there to be a flat surface is instead, essentially, a windowed opening. You don't think it's purely open like you could just jump through. There is some sort of glass that coats it, but there is a brass cross-beam at the very top, and then part of this cross-beam holds aloft this strange series of metallic wires that spiral and intertwine that serves as a conical focus piece. You can't see the interior of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a magic fun bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a magic fun bag. It's probably got everything from Silence and Dispel Magic to Petrify to a disintegration ray.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're thinking about this wrong, though. You're thinking about this in the wrong direction. Beholder is not-- that's not the goal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The horn is the goal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Even more than that, it's the hundreds of allies we could have.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Exactly! We free the Elder Brain, they attack it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Prison is the target.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not the beholder?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not the beholder. If we can free the Elder Brain--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We don't have to fight it ourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then we're not alone. Now, what was creating this green light? Where was it emanating from?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It seemed to be emanating from the top opening of this pyramid that was the main temple of the center of town.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can you describe the top of the pyramid?
